pageDesc: Review and undo past file organization and renaming actions.
emptyDesc: When you organize files, you can undo the batch anytime. We'll show those batches right here!
confirmDesc: This will rename and move all organized files back to their original names and folders.
confirmWarning: Are you sure you want to undo this batch?
toastErrorDesc: Oops! We couldn't start the undo operation.
alreadyRevertedTooltip: This batch has already been undone.
watchedPageDesc: See recently watched items and playback activity.
watchedEmptyDesc: Your recently watched movies and tv will be listed here.
